blocks.content:
Day advanced to 2026-02-25.
10,025 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-24 -> 2026-02-25)

- "Which country will host the next round of indirect US-Iran talks on Monday, March 2, 2026?" → Austria
- "Which university will say by February 28, 2026 that US immigration agents made misrepresentations to get into one of its student housing buildings?" → Columbia University
- "In which city will the next technical talks between Iranian and US officials be held in early March 2026?" → Vienna
- "What Turkish province will be identified by 15 March 2026 as the site of a deadly collision between a migrant boat and a coastguard vessel?" → Antalya
- "Which Barcelona midfielder will be ruled out for up to six weeks with a hamstring injury by February 27, 2026?" → Frenkie de Jong

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (191 resolved, 139 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
